title: Does Intermittent Fasting Work for Women Over 40? What the Research Shows
seo_title: Intermittent Fasting for Women Over 40: What Research Shows
meta_description: Discover how intermittent fasting affects women over 40 differently, what the science shows for perimenopausal women, and how to do it safely without losing muscle.
tags: intermittent fasting, metabolism, women over 40, weight loss, hormones, blood sugar, lean muscle
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: Intermittent fasting can offer real metabolic benefits for women over 40, but hormonal changes mean the approach needs to be tailored to midlife physiology. Learn what the research actually shows and how to fast safely after 40.
